ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trees" (
  "tree_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the tree */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address where the tree is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location within the address */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the tree */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the tree */,
  "trunk_diameter" TEXT /* Diameter of the trunk */,
  "defects" TEXT /* Description of any defects */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the tree's maintenance or condition */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the tree */,
  "vitality" TEXT /* Current vitality status (e.g., Healthy, Weak, Death) */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Soil type in which the tree is planted */,
  "tree_images" TEXT /* Images of the tree in a comma-separated format */,
  "planting_date" TEXT /* The date when the tree was planted */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* The date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* The scheduled date for the next inspection */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* The date of the last maintenance action */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* The scheduled date for the next maintenance action */,
  "maintenance_comments" TEXT /* Detailed comments or notes from the last maintenance action */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* The latitude of the tree's location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* The longitude of the tree's location */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The user who created the tree record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the tree record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* The user who last updated the tree record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the tree record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trees_species FOREIGN KEY ("species") REFERENCES tree_species ("species_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trees_vitality FOREIGN KEY ("vitality") REFERENCES vitality_status ("vitality_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trees_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Details about the location (e.g., area description) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* The latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* The longitude of the location */,
  "area_size" TEXT /* The size of the area in square meters */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The user who created the location record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the location record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* The user who last updated the location record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tree_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species characteristics */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "native_region" TEXT /* Native region where the species originates */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species in years */,
  "preferred_soil_type" TEXT /* Preferred soil type for the species */,
  "preferred_sunlight" TEXT /* Preferred sunlight conditions (e.g., full sun, partial shade) */,
  "water_requirements" TEXT /* Water requirements for the species */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The user who created the species record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the species record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* The user who last updated the species record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the species record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vitality_status" (
  "vitality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vitality status */,
  "vitality_name" TEXT /* Name of the vitality status (e.g., Healthy, Weak, Death) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what this status implies */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* A color code to visually represent the vitality status */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The user who created the vitality status record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the vitality status record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* The user who last updated the vitality status record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the vitality status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vitality_id")
)
